title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Lido Learning - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Lido Learning - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Lido Learning invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lido Learning:
Lido Learning is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lido Learning!
